AI Overview

This is a Giant frogfish (Antennarius commerson), a species of anglerfish in the family Antennariidae found on coral reefs across the Indo-Pacific.

Visual matches

  • Giant frogfish (Antennarius commerson)
  • Painted frogfish (Antennarius pictus)
  • Warty frogfish (Antennarius maculatus)
  • Striated frogfish (Antennarius striatus)
  • Hairy frogfish (Antennarius hispidus)
  • Randall's frogfish (Antennarius randalli)
